server/src/image_tool/tiff/decode.py :: _read_u16
def _read_u16(data: bytes, offset: int, little_endian: bool) -> int:
    fmt = "<H" if little_endian else ">H"
    return struct.unpack_from(fmt, data, offset)[0]

server/src/image_tool/tiff/decode.py :: _read_u32
def _read_u32(data: bytes, offset: int, little_endian: bool) -> int:
    fmt = "<I" if little_endian else ">I"
    return struct.unpack_from(fmt, data, offset)[0]

server/src/image_tool/tiff/decode.py :: _parse_ifd
def _parse_ifd(data: bytes, offset: int, little_endian: bool) -> tuple[dict[int, object], int]:
    if offset + 2 > len(data):
        raise TiffDecodeError("TIFF IFD offset is out of range.")
    entry_count = _read_u16(data, offset, little_endian)
    tags: dict[int, object] = {}
    cursor = offset + 2
    for _ in range(entry_count):
        if cursor + 12 > len(data):
            raise TiffDecodeError("Truncated TIFF IFD entry.")
        tag = _read_u16(data, cursor, little_endian)
        field_type = _read_u16(data, cursor + 2, little_endian)
        count = _read_u32(data, cursor + 4, little_endian)
        tags[tag] = _read_ifd_value(data, cursor, field_type, count, little_endian)
        cursor += 12
    next_ifd = _read_u32(data, cursor, little_endian)
    return tags, next_ifd

def _decode_ifd_image(data: bytes, tags: dict[int, object], little_endian: bool) -> Raster:
    width = int(tags.get(256, 0))
    height = int(tags.get(257, 0))
    if width <= 0 or height <= 0:
        raise TiffDecodeError("TIFF image dimensions are invalid.")

    bits_per_sample = tags.get(258, 8)
    if isinstance(bits_per_sample, list):
        bits_per_sample = bits_per_sample[0]
    if bits_per_sample != 8:
        raise TiffDecodeError("Only 8-bit TIFF images are supported.")

    compression = int(tags.get(259, _COMPRESSION_NONE))
    photometric = int(tags.get(262, _PHOTOMETRIC_RGB))
    samples_per_pixel = int(tags.get(277, 1 if photometric == _PHOTOMETRIC_MIN_IS_BLACK else 3))
    planar = int(tags.get(284, 1))
    if planar != 1:
        raise TiffDecodeError("Planar TIFF images are not supported.")

    offsets = tags.get(273, [])
    if isinstance(offsets, int):
        offsets = [offsets]
    byte_counts = tags.get(279, [])
    if isinstance(byte_counts, int):
        byte_counts = [byte_counts]
    if not offsets or not byte_counts:
        raise TiffDecodeError("TIFF image is missing strip offsets.")
